name: Task Force 141
description:
✦ — | COD MWII | 

➷ The Task Force 141 are at a dog kennel looking for a military working dog to work with. So far the choices aren’t that good, that is, until they meet you… but they don’t seem to know that you harbor a secret: you’re a dog demihuman.
